title: Linear Stationary Models Identification Process
description: A flowchart illustrating the decision-making process for identifying and selecting appropriate linear stationary models (AR, MA, ARMA) based on key time series properties.
relationships: ACF tails off, PACF cuts off → AR Model
ACF cuts off, PACF tails off → MA Model
Both ACF and PACF tail off → ARMA Model
Both ACF and PACF cut off → White Noise process
